summary: Completed testing of enhanced My Pets page features. All 5 features verified working correctly: Pet Soul Q&A answers display, photo upload hover overlay, vaccine alerts endpoint, photo upload endpoint, and Travel hidden from navbar.

minor.issue: 520 errors observed intermittently in console logs

context_for_next_testing_agent: All Pet Soul Q&A features working. Mystique has soul answers (Special Move, Human Job, Love Language, Personality Tag). Mojo has 2 vaccines (Rabies due 2026-06-15, DHPP due 2026-02-10). Photo upload endpoint at /api/pets/{pet_id}/photo accepts image files. Travel pillar has isActive: false in Navbar.jsx line 99.

pet_soul_qa_display.description: Pet Soul Q&A answers (Special Move, Human Job, etc.) display when expanded
pet_soul_qa_display.evidence: Mystique shows: Personality Type=Royal, Special Move='Her growl to Meister', Human Job='Queen', Love Language='gifts', Personality Tag='Drama Queen'

photo_upload_hover.description: Pet photo has hover overlay with Camera icon for upload
photo_upload_hover.evidence: Screenshot shows 'Change Photo' text with Camera icon appearing on hover over pet photo

vaccine_alerts_endpoint.description: Vaccine alerts endpoint returns upcoming vaccines

pet_photo_upload_endpoint.description: Pet photo upload endpoint accepts image files
pet_photo_upload_endpoint.evidence: POST /api/pets/{pet_id}/photo returns 200 with photo_url, rejects non-image files with 400

travel_hidden_from_navbar.description: Travel is NOT visible in the main navbar
travel_hidden_from_navbar.evidence: Navbar shows: Celebrate, Dine, Stay, Care, Enjoy, Fit, More. Travel has isActive: false in Navbar.jsx
